# Install `faq-section` — FAQ Section

> Canonical FAQ accordion section — eyebrow + headline + accordion item list.

📚 Knowledge base : https://resource.rahmanef.com/llms.txt
📦 Slice detail   : https://resource.rahmanef.com/slices/faq-section
🧠 JSON catalog   : https://resource.rahmanef.com/api/knowledge?slice=faq-section
🤖 Prompt page    : https://resource.rahmanef.com/agents/faq-section

## 1. Install

```bash
npx rahman-resources add faq-section
# alias: npx rr add faq-section
```

## 2. What it ships

- tags: `ui`, `faq`, `section`, `accordion`, `marketing`

## 3. Wire it up

Run `npx rr add faq-section`. <FAQSection items title subtitle layout multiple defaultOpen footerCta /> — only `items` required. Each item: `{ id, q, a, category? }`. `layout="grouped"` buckets by `category`. `multiple` lets users open several at once. `footerCta={{ label, href }}` wires a contact link below the accordion.

## Rules of engagement

- shadcn-only UI primitives. No raw `<button>` / `<dialog>` / native date or file inputs.
- 200-line hard cap per source file (extract neighbours when over).
- All Convex queries hit an index (`.withIndex(...)`); never bare `.collect()`.
- Public mutations/queries declare `args:` validators + authz.
- Full ruleset: https://resource.rahmanef.com/best-practice
